name: rad-nextjs
description: RAD Next.js — comprehensive Next.js coding standards, security hardening, testing patterns, and troubleshooting guidance. Covers App Router architecture, Server/Client component boundaries, data fetching, caching, performance optimization (Core Web Vitals), authentication, OWASP protection, Vitest/Cypress/Playwright testing, and common bug diagnosis. Built from 58 curated sources including official Next.js docs, security guides, academic papers, and enterprise case studies.
